title: Reminders
scope: Per-user 'tell me X at time Y' reminders: one-shot and recurring (RRULE), an optional nag mode that re-fires daily until acknowledged, and snooze; plus a desktop UI to edit the list. A fired reminder hands off to the Notifications app for delivery. NOT a calendar or recurring-schedule engine (the Schedules app owns backing schedules), and NOT the notification-delivery layer itself.

specs.title: Set a reminder
specs.behavior: Setting a reminder records a message and a specific due date/time and, when an RRULE is supplied, makes it recurring; it assigns an r- id and adds it to the user's active reminders.

specs.title: Set a nag
specs.behavior: A nag is a low-ceremony persistent daily nudge: it records a message (and an optional time-of-day slot) that re-fires every day until the user acknowledges or cancels it.

specs.title: List reminders
specs.behavior: Listing returns the user's reminders (active by default; optionally including inactive/past ones), surfaced in chat and in the desktop Reminders app.

specs.title: Modify a reminder
specs.behavior: Modifying an existing reminder or nag changes only the fields supplied — message, due time, recurrence (or clearing it), or nag time-slot — leaving the rest unchanged.

specs.title: Cancel a reminder
specs.behavior: Cancelling deactivates an active reminder by id so it no longer fires.

specs.title: Snooze a reminder
specs.behavior: Snoozing a reminder or nag creates a one-time follow-up that fires after a given duration, deferring the nudge without cancelling the original recurrence.
